name: Watched in the dark | Twisted Dyle Timesly
description:
Darkness surrounds you, as you work on a machine. However, something large is closely watching you, looming over the island you've been standing behind, but not trying to tear you to pieces...

Art made by me

Yayy, a good update in dandy's world... and a new character for me to add in the 'daddy' list. Made a bot of his twisted, and the scenario is pretty much neutral, and the user is any pov. So, have fun.

👍

Also if someone checked my Dandy bot... I plan to delete it and just write a new, better one. Since it was my first attempt at making bots in Janitor ai.

maybe i should do regular dyle as well

like

fluff bot, where user is his pookie bear

i think sounds neat

and soulvester is now in my list (i grinded for all four Halloween toons, now i basically speedrunned the whole event💔)

Okay i made another sketch, this time i actually tried using blending brush. I think it's neat for making more slick surfaces (or oiled up men)

it's useless to count, the number is growing ❤️❤️❤️

btw im planning to redraw the bot image since it was drawn back in august, and i see clear mistakes in it, plus dyle fans will love some juicy content so yeah

psst there will be a christmas normal dyle bot, since i want to write some fluff plus to shit on the costume he's gaining in the x-mas event. that shi looks so ass bro, ill draw him in santa costume with unbuttoned coat, and his tits out without a shirt so yeah
creator: misterperdun4ik
